description: You are an epidemiologist investigating a mumps outbreak. Using the Mumps dataset (C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\Mumps\Mumps.mdb, table: Survey), perform a frequency analysis on all relevant variables and create a 2x2 table of vaccination status versus illness outcome to compute the crude odds ratio. Conduct a multivariable logistic regression with illness as the outcome and vaccination status as the primary predictor, controlling for age group and other relevant covariates. Save the complete analysis output to C:\Users\Docker\mumps_analysis.html and export a summary CSV containing variable names and their effect estimates (OR, 95% CI) to C:\Users\Docker\mumps_ve_summary.csv.

metadata.primary_outcome: illness indicator variable in the Mumps Survey dataset
metadata.primary_exposure: vaccination status variable in the Mumps Survey dataset
covariates: other demographic variables present in dataset
